message: team-lead §5 leader keystroke budget: the leader may only edit the plan/spec, briefs, ledger rows, synthesis docs, and one-line fixups directly — bulk mechanical edits belong to a builder lane. This Edit/Write landed on a non-plan/brief/ledger/synthesis path. If you are the leader and this is one of several such edits this session, stop and dispatch a builder brief instead of continuing to edit directly.
